title: UK overseas trade in goods statistics February 2025: import and export data
body: "The following tables contain EU and non-EU import and export data for February 2025 at chapter level.               UK overseas trade in goods statistics February 2025: imports    ODS, 26.2 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format                 UK overseas trade in goods statistics February 2025: exports    ODS, 26.5 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format    "
